---
title: "联系"
---

<a class="lang-switch" href="/contact.html">EN</a>

<section class="panel panel-dark contact-panel">
<h2>联系</h2>
<p><strong>Email</strong><br>
<a href="mailto:wangran940@163.com">wangran940@163.com</a></p>
<p><strong>GitHub</strong><br>
<a href="https://github.com/Olivia-wr-research">https://github.com/Olivia-wr-research</a></p>
</section>
